message:
feat(runtime): integrate IoDriver into RuntimeState

Adds optional IoDriver integration to RuntimeState for reactor support:
- Add io_driver: Option<IoDriver> field for optional reactor integration
- Add with_reactor(Arc<dyn Reactor>) constructor for production use
- Add without_reactor() constructor (alias for new()) for Lab mode
- Add io_driver()/io_driver_mut()/has_io_driver() accessors
- Update is_quiescent() to check I/O driver registration state
- Add 7 unit tests and 1 epoll integration test

This enables the runtime to wait on I/O events when a reactor is present
while maintaining backward compatibility with pure Lab mode operation.

Closes: asupersync-3utu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
